title: Olli Saranko will defend his PhD thesis
content:
Olli Saranko will defend his PhD thesis

mkulmala@helsinki.fi Thu, 21/05/2026 - 10:51

Olli Saranko from FMI will defend his PhD thesis “Modeling of current and projected urban temperatures and related uncertainties in Finnish cities” on Friday 5th June 2026 at 12:00 in Physicum E204.

The opponent is Dr. Natalie Theeuwes from KNMI, the Netherlands, and the Custos is Prof Leena Järvi. 

You are all welcome to attend. There is also possibility to follow online:

title: Ecophysiology mini-seminar on June 1, 2026
content:
Ecophysiology mini-seminar on June 1, 2026

mkulmala@helsinki.fi Thu, 21/05/2026 - 08:50

Welcome to a mini-seminar where the ACCC visiting professor Ram Oren (Duke University, USA) and two local researchers from Luke and University of Helsinki will present their research synthesis and some recent results. The event is open to everyone, and coffee will be served in the lobby area.

This mini-seminar is co-organised by INAR, ACCC Flagship and Luke.

Venue: Viikki A building LS7 (lecture room 104)
Program:

12:30

title: Ruokahävikki voi olla myös valinta
content:
When food waste is a choice

heheiki@helsinki.fi Wed, 20/05/2026 - 12:51
Food waste is not always the result of carelessness or lack of knowledge; it may also be a choice based on time use and costs. A University of Helsinki study sheds light on why food waste persists despite good intentions.

Households account for almost half of all food thrown away in Finland, and food waste is among the key sustainability challenges associated with fo

title: Indonesia Inc.: A brief history of entrepreneurship in the name of development
content:
Indonesia Inc.: A brief history of entrepreneurship in the name of development

ehrlichm@helsinki.fi Tue, 19/05/2026 - 12:15
New analysis on the Indonesian Omnibus Law – published on the criticalasianstudies.org Commentary Board. In this new blog post, Moira Moeliono, Tristam Moeliono, Maria Brockhaus, and Grace Wong share some insights in the history of entrepreneurship in the name of development.

You can find the link below.

title: Workshop: Alexis de Tocqueville - French Revolution and Democracy
content:
Workshop: Alexis de Tocqueville - French Revolution and Democracy

aipi@helsinki.fi Tue, 19/05/2026 - 09:47
This workshop is part of the ongoing work of re-reading classic democratic theory, starting from the period of the French revolution and including the work of Jean-Jacques Rousseau, Edmund Burke, and Alexis de Tocqueville. The particular focus of this workshop is on the texts by Alexis de Tocqueville.

title: Arkadiankadun siltaremontti aiheuttaa muutoksia liikennejärjestelyihin Luonnontieteellisen museon lähistöllä
content:
Renewal of Arkadiankatu Bridge will cause changes to traffic arrangements near the Natural History Museum

johanemi@helsinki.fi Wed, 07/01/2026 - 08:40
The renovation is expected to be completed in late 2026.

The renovation will start with the construction of temporary traffic arrangements from Wednesday 7 January onwards. The renovation is expected to be completed in late 2026.

content:
